title: pyrrocoma scaberula
intro: Pyrrocoma scaberula, also known as the rough rosette or rough pyrrocoma, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Pyrrocoma scaberula are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
